Description: State/location of the customer, useful for understanding regional churn behavior
Number of days/months the customer has been with the telecom company (tenure indicator)

Indicates whether the customer has an international calling plan (Yes/No)
Indicates whether the customer has subscribed to a voicemail plan (Yes/No)
Count of voicemail messages, reflects service usage level
Total minutes of calls made during daytime
Number of calls made during daytime
Total charges incurred for daytime calls

Number of calls made during evening
Total charges incurred for evening calls
Total minutes of calls made during night
Number of calls made during night
Total charges incurred for night calls
Total minutes of international calls made by the customer
Number of international calls made
